word: H3072 - יְהֹוָה צִדְקֵנוּ - Yᵉhôvâh tsidqênûw - ye-ho-vaw' tsid-kay'-noo - The Lord our righteousness

sections.paragraph:
Original: יהוה צדקנוּ

Transliteration: yehôvâh tsidqênû

Phonetic: ye-ho-vaw' tsid-kay'-noo

BDB Definition:

  1. a sacred name symbolically applied to Jerusalem and the Messiah

Origin: from H3068 and H6664 with pronominal suffix

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
